[[inst_bstart_tepl]]
==== BSTART.TEPL

*Syntax:* BSTART.TEPL TileOpcode, DataType

*Description:* Tile opcode selects PTO template ops. Canonical v0.56 standardized assignments require TileOpcode[9:6]=0 and pack TileOpcode[5]=Mode with TileOpcode[4:0]=Function; unassigned values remain reserved for future template extension.

*Encoding:*

image::../generated/encodings/enc_bstart_tepl.svg[BSTART.TEPL encoding,width=800]

*Uop-Class:* CMD

*Compression:* L32 (len=32)

*Uop-Class payload:* `{"cmd_kind": "BLOCK_SPLIT", "note": "User corrected to A", "source": "group_rule", "uop_kind": "CMD"}`
